creator: sebastian.tymkow@gmail.com
text:
On IBM BladeCenter HS22 I got error message "No PHY found on Child MII bus"
during boot stage.
System doesn't see any bce interface.
I was trying various solutions i.e.: FreeBSD 7.2 amd64 Release, 7.2
amd64 Stable, 8.0 Release.

How-To-Repeat: Install FreeBSD 7.2 Release/Stable on HS22
